statement: In every magma, Equation 1356 (`x = y * (((z * x) * y) * w)`) implies Equation 76 (`x = y * (y * (y * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0938
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z x) y) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op y (op y y)))
